accepts.description: Specifies the content type that the export will be in, such as 'application/json'.

export_type.description: Defines the type of export, such as 'oas30' for OpenAPI 3.0.

parameters.description: A map of parameters for the export, where keys and values are strings.

rest_api_id.description: The identifier of the REST API to export.

stage_name.description: The name of the stage that you want to export.
